title: upgrade_software
body: Upgrade to a currently supported stable version following vendor guidance. Validate the upgrade in staging and rerun scans to confirm risk reduction.

title: restrict_service_exposure
body: Restrict service exposure using firewall rules, security groups, and host-based controls so only approved source networks can reach the service.

title: disable_anonymous_access
body: Disable anonymous access and enforce authenticated access with least privilege. Review existing anonymous shares or accounts and remove them.

title: add_security_headers
body: Add HTTP security headers such as Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, and HSTS where applicable.

title: enforce_network_segmentation
body: Move sensitive services to segmented internal networks. Require jump hosts, VPN, or controlled proxy access for administration workflows.

title: close_unused_ports
body: Close non-essential ports and disable unneeded services. Keep a documented list of required ports and continuously verify exposure.

title: place_service_behind_vpn_or_allowlist
body: Place management interfaces behind VPN, private connectivity, or strict allowlists. Avoid exposing administrative portals directly to the internet.
